The '''Battle of Condawn''' was a conflict in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] where [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Starkiller's]] father [[Annikin Starkiller|Annikin]] died by the hands of the treacherous [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] of the galactic capital of [[Alderaan (The Star Wars)|Alderaan]].

[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Ben Kenobi's]] [[Kaiburr crystal|Kiber Crystal]] was taken by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], Ben's apprentice, during the battle and later hidden on Alderaan after he joined the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].

==Behind the scenes==
This battle is mentioned only in the third draft of the original film. It became the subject of a considerable amount of [[fanon]] before the release of the [[Prequel trilogy]].
